hero.headline: Your Hagerstown HVAC team — *one call fixes it*
hero.subheadline: Fast service, clean work, and air that actually feels right.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every system, every season
services_section.subheading: From duct cleaning to emergency repairs

services.title: Air Duct Cleaning
services.description: Remove dust, debris, and allergens from your ductwork. Clean ducts mean cleaner air and better efficiency.

services.title: AC Repair & Maintenance
services.description: Keep your cooling system running smooth. Thorough diagnostics and reliable repairs when you need them.

services.title: Heating System Service
services.description: Furnace repairs, tune-ups, and installations. Stay warm when Maryland winters hit hard.

services.title: Emergency HVAC
services.description: System quit working? We respond fast to get your comfort back on track.

about.heading: Real techs, real solutions
about.body: We're the Hagerstown HVAC team that shows up when we say we will. No call centers, no runaround — just honest work and straight answers.

reviews.name: Marie F.
reviews.text: Excellent air duct cleaning service. Noah was knowledgeable, explained the problem areas, and cleaned everything thoroughly. Fast and efficient.

reviews.name: Luz L.
reviews.text: After months of musty air, I had my ducts cleaned and the difference is amazing. Professional team, spotless work. Air feels fresh and system runs better.

reviews.name: Joshua R.
reviews.text: Technician was prompt and thorough, explained every step of the maintenance. My A/C runs perfectly now. Very satisfied.

cta.heading: Ready for better air?
cta.body: Free estimates on all HVAC work. Call now and we'll get your system running right.
